name: Excessive Firewall Denies from Single Source
notes: Reports excessive firewall denies from a single host. Detects more than 400 firewall deny attempts from a single source to a single destination within 5 minutes.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Denies with the same source IP more than 400 times
conditions_text: when the domain is one of the following Array
when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Servers
when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Denies with the same source IP more than 400 times, across exactly 1 destination IP within 5 minutes
thresholds: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Denies with the same source IP more than 400 times, across exactly 1 destination IP within 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Excessive Firewall Denies from Single Source on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the domain is one of the following Array
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Servers
AND when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Denies with the same source IP more than 400 times, across exactly 1 destination IP within 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Excessive Firewall Denies Between Hosts

Event description: Detected more than 400 firewall deny attempts from a single source to a single destination within 5 minutes. This often indicates a service that was once used is now being blocked by a firewall.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
